case_title: AMERICAN HOTELS, INC. vs. BARKER, CLAUDE

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BARKER, CLAUDE

JUDGE BALLATI, GGOROSIN, CLERK, REPORTER WAIVED. 2:25 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. THOMAS WRIGHT FOR PLTF, DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS EMBODIED IN A JUDGMENT SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES AND SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARKER, CLAUDE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 POWELL STREET, #210, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JAN-15-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, ACTUAL EVICTION IS STAYED UNTIL 1/15/96, BUT COMPUTER KICKED IT OVER TO 1/16/96. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
